languages.text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верой и правдой служила династии до того дня, когда была вероломно убита одним из своих ближайших подчиненных, разглядевшем в ее истовой любви к межзвездным путешествиям начало еретической схизмы.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.
languages.original_text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верой и правдой служила династии до того дня, когда была вероломно убита одним из своих ближайших подчиненных, разглядевшем в ее истовой любви к межзвездным путешествиям начало еретической схизмы.

traits.locale_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、王朝に忠誠を誓い、その生涯を尽くした。しかし、彼女は、宇宙旅行への熱意が異端の分裂の始まりだと見込んだ、最も親しい部下によって裏切られ、殺害された。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、王朝に忠誠を誓い、その生涯を尽くした。しかし、彼女は、宇宙旅行への熱意が異端の分裂の始まりだと見込んだ、最も親しい部下によって裏切られ、殺害された。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡对王朝一直忠心耿耿，直到有一天她被最亲近的一名下属背叛并暗杀。在那个下属眼中，她对星际旅行的狂热，就是异端分裂的开端。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡对王朝一直忠心耿耿，直到有一天她被最亲近的一名下属背叛并暗杀。在那个下属眼中，她对星际旅行的狂热，就是异端分裂的开端。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie jusqu'au jour où elle fut tuée par l'un de ses subalternes les plus proches, qui avait cru reconnaître les germes d'un schisme hérétique dans sa passion pour le voyage interstellaire.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie jusqu'au jour où elle fut tuée par l'un de ses subalternes les plus proches, qui avait cru reconnaître les germes d'un schisme hérétique dans sa passion pour le voyage interstellaire.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió a la dinastía con lealtad de corazón hasta el día en que uno de sus subordinados más cercanos la asesinó al ver en su desenfrenada pasión por el viaje interestelar los inicios de un cisma herético.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió a la dinastía con lealtad de corazón hasta el día en que uno de sus subordinados más cercanos la asesinó al ver en su desenfrenada pasión por el viaje interestelar los inicios de un cisma herético.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, yıldızlar arası seyahate olan ateşli sevgisinde kâfirce bir bölünmenin başlangıcını gören en yakın astlarından biri tarafından haince öldürüldüğü güne kadar hanedanlığa sadakatle ve inançla hizmet etti.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, yıldızlar arası seyahate olan ateşli sevgisinde kâfirce bir bölünmenin başlangıcını gören en yakın astlarından biri tarafından haince öldürüldüğü güne kadar hanedanlığa sadakatle ve inançla hizmet etti.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski leistete der Dynastie treue Dienste, bis sie von einem ihrer engsten Untergebenen feige ermordet wurde, der in ihrer Begeisterung für interstellare Reisen den Beginn einer häretischen Spaltung zu erkennen glaubte.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.
